field.label: Categoria
field.expression: select descripcion from CATEGHISTORIA left join CATPERSONAL on CATPERSONAL.IdSindicato = CATEGHISTORIA.idSindicato and CATPERSONAL.IdCateg = CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg where CATEGHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona and CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde < CURDATE() order by CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1

field.label: Años
field.expression: CONCAT(IF((YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) > 0, (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) - (MID(CURDATE(), 6, 5) < MID(fecing, 6, 5)), IF((YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) < 0, (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) + (MID(fecing, 6, 5) < MID(CURDATE(), 6, 5)), (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)))), ' Años')

field.label: meses
field.expression: CONCAT(IF((((YEAR(CURDATE()) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(CURDATE())) - ((YEAR(fecing) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(fecing))) > 0, (((YEAR(CURDATE()) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(CURDATE())) - ((YEAR(fecing) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(fecing))) - (MID(CURDATE(), 9, 2) > MID(fecing, 9, 2)), IF((((YEAR(CURDATE()) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(CURDATE())) - ((YEAR(fecing) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(fecing))) < 0, (((YEAR(CURDATE()) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(CURDATE())) - ((YEAR(fecing) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(fecing))) + (MID(fecing, 9, 2) < MID(CURDATE(), 9, 2)), (((YEAR(CURDATE()) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(CURDATE())) - ((YEAR(fecing) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(fecing))))) - IF((YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) > 0, (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) - (MID(CURDATE(), 6, 5) < MID(fecing, 6, 5)), IF((YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) < 0, (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) + (MID(fecing, 6, 5) < MID(CURDATE(), 6, 5)), (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)))) * 12 , ' Meses')
